verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You thought I was worth saving So, You came and changed my life You thought I was worth keeping So, You cleaned me up inside You thought I was to die for So, You sacrificed your life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So, I could be free So, I could be whole So, I could tell everyone I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You thought I was worth saving So, You came and change my life You thought I was worth keeping So, You cleaned me up inside You thought I was to die for So, You sacrificed Your life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So, I could be free So, I can be whole So, I could tell everyone I know

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You thought I was worth saving So, You came and changed my life You thought I was worth keeping So, You cleaned me up inside You thought I was to die for So, You sacrificed Your life

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So, I could be free So, I could be whole So, I could tell everyone I know

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You thought I was worth saving So, You came and changed my life You thought I was worth keeping So, You cleaned me up inside You thought I was to die for So, You sacrificed Your life

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So, I could be free So, I could be whole So, I could tell everyone I know

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Hallelujah Glory to God who changed my life I will praise You, forever I will worship You, forever I will give You glory, forever

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Because I am free Because I am whole And I will tell everyone I know

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Hallelujah Glory to God who changed my life I will praise You, forever I will worship You, forever I will give You glory, forever

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Because I am free Because I am whole And I will tell everyone I know

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Hallelujah Glory to God who changed my life I will praise You, forever I will worship You, forever I will give You glory, forever I will give You glory, forever Because You deserve it, Lord I will praise You, forever Because You deserve it, Lord

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Because I am free Because I am whole And I will tell everyone I know

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: You thought I was worth saving So, you came in changed my life You thought I worth keeping So, you cleaned me up inside You thought I was to die for You thought I was to die for You thought I was to die for You thought I was to die for You sacrificed your life So, I can be free
